caption: The video captures a scene from what appears to be a community event or meeting, possibly related to an organization named ORCA, as indicated by the logo in the corner. The setting is indoors, with a group of people seated and facing two individuals on stage. On the left, an older man stands behind a podium, speaking into a microphone. He is dressed casually in a light blue shirt. To his right, a younger man with long hair tied back is also speaking into a microphone while holding a guitar, suggesting he might perform music later. The audience, consisting of adults of various ages, listens attentively. The atmosphere seems formal yet relaxed, with everyone engaged in the proceedings. The background features wooden blinds covering large windows, adding to the indoor ambiance.
